lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: Greetings and welcome to my pickaxe shop. Do you want to buy my premium quality pickaxes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are your pickaxes better than other pickaxes, then?

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: Of course they are! My pickaxes are made of higher grade metal than your ordinary bronze pickaxes, allowing you to mine that ore just a little bit faster than normal.

sections.title: With a dragon pickaxe (broken) in inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Nurmof, I found this earlier...

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: Oh, a dragon pickaxe! And a broken one at that. I haven't seen one of those in a while.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you fix it for me? I was told you're the dwarf to see!

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: I did indeed fix pickaxes in the past, many years ago. They were a lot more common back then.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: In fact, this is the first broken pickaxe I've seen in a very long time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why were there so many broken pickaxes back then?

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: Ore rocks used to be quite unstable. They would randomly explode when you were mining them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds terrifying!

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: It was. But then one day, the explosions just... stopped. As if someone flipped an off switch somewhere.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: I've not seen a broken pickaxe since then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you still be able to fix mine for me?

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: I should think so. I'll need to buy some new tools.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: They're quite expensive, but they will get the job done. The pickaxe will be as good as new when I've finished with it.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: The cost will be about...

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: ...let me see. I need another one of these, and I can reuse that if I replace the drill bit from there...

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: ...hmm, and this needs a full clean, oh and I don't have one of those anymore...

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: ...okay! It'll cost about 2,500,000 GP, give or take a few coins. Would you like me to fix it for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's do it.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: Lovely! Okay, give me a moment. It may take a little while, it's a tough metal to work with.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: There you go, good as new, just like I said!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you very much. I'll take good care of it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I actually don't have enough coins on me! I'll come back with more.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: I'll be here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's rather expensive...

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: It is! But you can't cheap out on quality. If a job's worth doing, do it well.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: I'm also the only one who can repair pickaxes these days, so you don't really have much choice!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then, let's do it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll think about it.

lines.speaker: Nurmof
lines.text: I'll be here!
